button.label: Add/Edit Citation
button.supertip: Insert a new citation, or edit the citation at the current cursor position

button.label: Document Tools
button.supertip: Manage document citations, authorities, bibliography, and preferences

button.label: Add Annotation
button.supertip: Insert an annotation at the current cursor position

button.label: Add Note
button.supertip: Insert a new note at the current cursor position

button.label: Document Preferences
button.supertip: Change the citation style or locale

button.label: Citation Explorer
button.supertip: View and manage citations in this document

button.label: Refresh
button.supertip: Update all citations to reflect changes

button.label: Unlink Citations
button.supertip: Remove all Citate field codes and unlink from Citate library
